summary: PR 2530 advanced decompilation of src/melee/gr/granime.c, adding bodies or partial improvements for several grAnime functions, tightening granime prototypes, adding typed fields for stage animation archive entries, replacing several raw __assert blocks with HSD_ASSERT/HSD_ASSERTREPORT, and introducing narrow inline/noinline wrapper helpers used for matching-sensitive calls. The bot report records 3 new matches and 3 unmatched-item improvements, plus a .sdata regression.

key_files.role: Main decomp/matching work: added or improved grAnime function bodies, assert macro cleanup, typed archive field use, varargs handling, recursive traversal, and matching wrapper helpers.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/granime.c added 294 deleted 59 hunks 20
raw_diff: src/melee/gr/granime.c additions for grAnime_801C752C, grAnime_801C7C1C, grAnime_801C8578, grAnime_801C86D4 changes
text_corpus issue_comment: bot reports new matches for grAnime_801C752C, grAnime_801C8578, grAnime_801C86D4 and improvements for grAnime_801C7C1C, grAnime_801C6A54, grAnime_801C7228

key_files.role: Header prototype updates for recovered signatures.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grAnime_801C752C prototype changed from HSD_JObj*, ... to HSD_JObj*, s32, s32, void*, u32, ...
raw_diff: grAnime_801C8578 prototype changed from void*, void* to HSD_Joint*, s32*

key_files.role: Recovered typed fields in UnkStageDat_x8_t used by granime archive animation lookup.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: UnkStageDat_x8_t replaces u8 _4[0x10 - 0x4] with HSD_AnimJoint** unk4, HSD_MatAnimJoint** unk8, HSD_ShapeAnimJoint** unkC
raw_diff: grAnime_801C8138 replaces pointer casts at +0x4/+0x8/+0xC with archive->unk4->unk8[arg1].unk4/unk8/unkC

key_files.role: Target function checklist for granime work in this PR.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: new target_funcs.txt lists grAnime_801C86D4, grAnime_801C84A4, grAnime_801C8578, grAnime_801C6A54, grAnime_801C752C, grAnime_801C6C0C, grAnime_801C7228, grAnime_801C7C1C

what_changed: Added includes needed for the new code paths: baselib/debug.h, stdarg.h, and dolphin/os.h.
Added full source bodies for grAnime_801C752C and grAnime_801C8578 where the diff previously had decomp placeholders.
Added a large partial body for grAnime_801C7C1C, including animation archive lookups, all/partial animation application paths, rate and flag callback setup, and typed archive field access.
Improved grAnime_801C86D4 by using HSD_ASSERT, retrieving the root joint from archive->unk4->unk8[arg0].unk0, calling grAnime_801C8578_noinline, and passing the result to HSD_JObjResetRST.
Replaced raw __assert blocks in several places with HSD_ASSERT or HSD_ASSERTREPORT.
Updated granime.h prototypes for grAnime_801C752C and grAnime_801C8578 to reflect recovered parameter types.
Recovered UnkStageDat_x8_t fields at offsets +4, +8, and +C as animation-joint pointer arrays instead of an opaque byte pad.
Introduced multiple static inline *_inner and *_noinline wrapper helpers around grAnime calls, apparently to steer matching-sensitive inlining/call behavior.
Removed a PAD_STACK(16) from grAnime_801C6A54 and replaced a pragma dont_inline block around grAnime_801C67A8 with wrapper-based calls.
Bot report shows matched-code progress: +1080 bytes overall, 3 new matches, 3 unmatched-item improvements, and one .sdata regression.

smart_moves.text: Recovered typed fields in UnkStageDat_x8_t and then used those fields in granime.c instead of repeated raw pointer arithmetic against archive entries.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h adds unk4/unk8/unkC fields
raw_diff: grAnime_801C8138 uses archive->unk4->unk8[arg1].unkC/unk4/unk8

smart_moves.text: Updated owning header prototypes after recovering function signatures for grAnime_801C752C and grAnime_801C8578.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: granime.h prototype updates

smart_moves.text: Factored a repeated JObj-aobj/flags/assert sequence into grAnime_801C6F50_wrapped and reused it in grAnime_801C7228 and grAnime_801C752C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added grAnime_801C6F50_wrapped
raw_diff: grAnime_801C7228 calls grAnime_801C6F50_wrapped for obj and phi_r24
raw_diff: grAnime_801C752C calls grAnime_801C6F50_wrapped

smart_moves.text: Used HSD_ASSERT/HSD_ASSERTREPORT forms for plain assert/report cases instead of leaving expanded __assert blocks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: __assert at lines 0x33A, 0x556, 0x148, 0x602, 0x617 replaced with HSD_ASSERT forms
raw_diff: grAnime_801C752C default case uses HSD_ASSERTREPORT(0x36F, NULL, "not match arg_type\n")

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered function body proves a public signature, update the owning header in the same PR rather than leaving broad void*/variadic placeholders.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grAnime_801C752C body uses HSD_JObj*, s32, s32, void*, u32, ... and granime.h is updated accordingly
raw_diff: grAnime_801C8578 body uses HSD_Joint* and s32* and granime.h is updated accordingly

decomp_lessons.lesson: Archive entry struct recovery can unblock cleaner C in callers: once offsets +4/+8/+C were typed as animation pointer arrays, granime code could use fields instead of byte-offset loads.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h adds HSD_AnimJoint** unk4, HSD_MatAnimJoint** unk8, HSD_ShapeAnimJoint** unkC
raw_diff: grAnime_801C8138 removes casts from &archive->unk4->unk8[arg1] + offsets

decomp_lessons.lesson: Assert cleanup should preserve line numbers and messages while mapping expanded __assert patterns to HSD_ASSERT/HSD_ASSERTREPORT macros.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_ASSERT(0x556, archive), HSD_ASSERT(0x148, archive), HSD_ASSERT(0x602, archive), HSD_ASSERT(0x617, archive)
raw_diff: HSD_ASSERTREPORT(0x36F, NULL, "not match arg_type\n")

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recursive tree traversal may be the natural source form for child/next joint walks when the function carries a decrementing counter through recursive calls.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grAnime_801C8578 recursively descends joint->child then joint->next while decrementing *counter

naming_conventions.convention: Address-style grAnime function names were retained for still-unnamed global functions, while local names such as archive, child, root, joint, robj, flags2, and callbackArg arg describe immediate roles.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grAnime_801C752C locals obj_tmp, robj, flags2, child, callbackArg arg
raw_diff: grAnime_801C7C1C locals archive, ajp, mjp, sjp, child, eflags
raw_diff: grAnime_801C86D4 local root inside scoped block

naming_conventions.convention: Recovered struct fields remain offset-style unk names (unk4, unk8, unkC) where semantic names are not proven, but now carry precise pointer types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: UnkStageDat_x8_t fields named unk4, unk8, unkC with animation pointer-array types

naming_conventions.convention: Matching-control helper names use an address plus suffix pattern, e.g. grAnime_801C67A8_inner and grAnime_801C67A8_noinline.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added *_inner and *_noinline wrappers for grAnime_801C67A8, 801C683C, 801C6960, 801C69FC, 801C6A54, 801C706C, 801C8578

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used static inline indirection wrappers named *_inner and *_noinline to influence whether call sites inline or remain calls.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grAnime_801C67A8_noinline calls grAnime_801C67A8_inner
raw_diff: grAnime_801C7C1C calls grAnime_801C6A54_noinline, grAnime_801C69FC_noinline, grAnime_801C6960_noinline, grAnime_801C683C_noinline
raw_diff: grAnime_801C86D4 calls grAnime_801C8578_noinline
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: This is a matching tactic with evidence in the diff, but the PR contains no author explanation or objdiff details for why each wrapper was necessary.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Replaced a local #pragma dont_inline block with wrapper-based noinline-style call indirection.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed #pragma push/#pragma dont_inline on/#pragma pop around grAnime_801C67A8 call
raw_diff: call changed to grAnime_801C67A8_noinline(dobj->mobj, matanim)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Consistent with avoiding broad pragma steering, but the exact codegen reason is not documented in PR text.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Removed PAD_STACK(16) from grAnime_801C6A54 while the bot report shows grAnime_801C6A54 improved from 59.00% to 99.23%.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK(16) removed from grAnime_801C6A54
text_corpus issue_comment: grAnime_801C6A54 improved +177 bytes, 59.00% to 99.23%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The bot report supports improvement, but the PR slice does not isolate PAD_STACK removal as the cause.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used a union-like callbackArg local and va_arg dispatch in grAnime_801C752C to model callback argument variants by AOBJ_ARG_* type.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grAnime_801C752C declares va_list ap and callbackArg arg
raw_diff: switch over AOBJ_ARG_A, AOBJ_ARG_AF, AOBJ_ARG_AV, AOBJ_ARG_AU families with f64/void*/u32 va_arg reads

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduced scoped dummy-looking stack locals in grAnime_801C86D4 while replacing a temporary struct, likely for stack/register shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: struct sp removed and locals s32 sp2, sp3, sp, sp4 added; only sp is used in shown diff
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The unused-looking locals are tactic-like and should require verifier evidence before treating as normal style.

notes: The diff and bot report strongly support changed files and match-progress claims.
There is no PR body explanation and no human review feedback in the loaded slice.

The bot report validates three new matches and three improvements, but target_funcs.txt lists eight checked functions; target_funcs.txt should not be read as proof that all listed functions newly matched.
Wrapper/noinline and stack-local tactics are visible in source, but the PR slice lacks narrow objdiff rationale for each tactic.
The .sdata regression is reported by the bot, but the slice does not explain its cause or whether it was accepted intentionally.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Header prototypes should be tightened when recovered bodies prove signatures
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2530 recovered concrete signatures for grAnime_801C752C and grAnime_801C8578 and updated src/melee/gr/granime.h in the same diff, replacing broad placeholders.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grAnime_801C752C prototype update
raw_diff: grAnime_801C8578 prototype update

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer typed archive fields over raw offset loads when struct layout evidence exists
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2530 added typed fields at offsets +4/+8/+C in UnkStageDat_x8_t and used them in granime.c, replacing explicit pointer arithmetic for animation arrays.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h field additions
raw_diff: grAnime_801C8138 pointer-cast replacements

accepted_candidate_records.title: Assert macro cleanup should preserve line and message evidence
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2530 replaced several expanded __assert patterns with HSD_ASSERT/HSD_ASSERTREPORT while preserving line constants and, where applicable, report text.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_ASSERT line constants 0x33A, 0x556, 0x148, 0x602, 0x617
raw_diff: HSD_ASSERTREPORT at 0x36F with not match arg_type message

source_update_candidates.title: src/melee/gr/types.h UnkStageDat_x8_t animation pointer fields
source_update_candidates.text: In this PR, UnkStageDat_x8_t offset +4 was typed as HSD_AnimJoint** unk4, +8 as HSD_MatAnimJoint** unk8, and +C as HSD_ShapeAnimJoint** unkC; granime.c uses these fields for stage animation archive lookups.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h UnkStageDat_x8_t field changes
raw_diff: grAnime_801C7C1C and grAnime_801C8138 use archive->unk4->unk8[...].unk4/unk8/unkC
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential reusable path fact for future stage archive decomp work; requires curator validation against current source and later renames.

source_update_candidates.title: Track granime noinline wrapper tactic as a review-risk pattern
source_update_candidates.text: This PR introduced multiple *_inner and *_noinline wrappers to steer matching-sensitive calls and removed one pragma dont_inline block. These wrappers may be useful search anchors for later cleanup or matching rationale audits.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added grAnime_801C67A8_noinline, grAnime_801C683C_noinline, grAnime_801C6960_noinline, grAnime_801C69FC_noinline, grAnime_801C6A54_noinline, grAnime_801C706C_noinline, grAnime_801C8578_noinline
raw_diff: removed #pragma dont_inline block
source_update_candidates.reason: The tactic is visible but not explained by human review or objdiff notes in this slice; curator may want a cautionary source note or search index entry rather than a global standard.

source_update_candidates.title: Record bot-reported .sdata regression for PR 2530 granime
source_update_candidates.text: The bot report for PR 2530 shows one unmatched-item regression in main/melee/gr/granime .sdata from 71.43% to 47.06%. The slice does not explain the cause.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: .sdata regression -4, 71.43% to 47.06%
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential follow-up audit target; do not treat as accepted or intentional without later evidence.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all eight target_funcs.txt entries were newly matched; the bot report only lists three new matches and three improvements.
Do not promote wrapper-based *_noinline helpers as a generally accepted tactic from this PR alone; the diff shows use, but no human rationale or per-call objdiff evidence is present.
Do not infer semantic names for UnkStageDat_x8_t fields beyond the typed unk4/unk8/unkC names shown in this PR.
Do not claim the .sdata regression was acceptable or harmless; the bot report only records the regression.
